name: Channukah Candle Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bananas in half and remove tips. Stand upright in pineapple centers.
2. Top with gumdrop to represent flame. Pour a little mayo from tip of each candle to represent melted wax.
3. Arrange strip of pepper for handle, making a loop fastened into pineapple at base of candle.
Variation:
1. Cut red apples in half and remove cores. Set a half banana into center to represent candle, top with gumdrop and pour mayo down side of candle.
Variation #2:
1. Use canned asparagus tips for candles.
2. Arrange flat on a flattened lettuce leaf or finely shredded lettuce.
3. Make tips of carrot to represent flame, garnish with water cress, olives, radishes, and parsley.
4. Serve with French dressing. Serve individually or arrange on a long platter.
